message:
fix(fabric): add missing RecursiveImportTransfer variant to ServiceBoundaryError

The recursive import guard was added to FabricServiceBoundary::transfer()
but the corresponding enum variant was missing from ServiceBoundaryError,
causing compile failures when the messaging-fabric feature is enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
